fields.summary: UYZAB8901T - SIP amount wrong different from registered amount
fields.description: SIP of Rs 10000 deducted instead of Rs 5000.

analysis.summary: UYZAB8901T - SIP amount wrong different from registered amount
analysis.description: SIP of Rs 10000 deducted instead of Rs 5000.

comments.body: System error caused incorrect amount field mapping in SIP instruction. Transaction reversed. SIP amount corrected in system to Rs 5000. Escalated to engineering for root fix.
comments.author: support-agent@fundsindia.com
